fields.title: Remove shadow state and legacy bridge from tau persistence and sandbox
fields.description: Follow up on tau-viq. Persistence still keeps sync/global-style APIs around SubscriptionRef, sandbox still wraps legacy sandbox/index.ts through makeLegacyStateBridge, and app bootstrap still depends on mutable TauState adapters for non-migrated features. Goal: make persistence and sandbox the single source of truth, remove currentSnapshot/currentConfig-style shadow state and Effect.runFork state pushes, and delete legacy-bridge from bootstrap paths that no longer need it.
fields.close_reason: Shadow state removed from persistence (currentSnapshot) and sandbox (currentConfig). Legacy bridge decoupled from all init functions except sandbox/index.ts. app.ts no longer uses makeLegacyStateBridge.
